subtext: This policy explains what information we collect and how we use it.

policies.title: Information We Collect
policies.description: We only collect information that is necessary to provide the core services of Portfolyo.

items.label: Account Information
items.content: When you sign up via your Google or GitHub account, we receive your name, email address, and profile picture.

items.label: Portfolio Data
items.content: We store the information you provide about your work, including portfolio URLs, descriptions, technology stacks, and screenshots.

items.label: Usage Information
items.content: We track 'views' on portfolios to help you see engagement with your work.

items.label: Device Data
items.content: We may collect your Expo Push Token if you enable notifications, and basic device information provided by the Expo framework.

policies.title: How We Use Your Information
policies.description: Your data is used solely to provide and improve the Portfolyo experience.

items.label: Profile Management
items.content: To create and maintain your professional profile.

items.label: Community Discovery
items.content: To display your portfolio to other users in the 'Explore' section if you enable visibility.

items.label: Engagement
items.content: To allow users to bookmark portfolios they find inspiring.

items.label: Maintenance
items.content: To improve the app experience and troubleshoot technical issues.

policies.title: Third-Party Services
policies.description: We use reliable third-party providers to power the app's infrastructure.

items.label: Authentication
items.content: Secure sign-in via trusted OAuth providers.

items.label: Storage
items.content: Cloud database management and secure file storage for screenshots.

items.label: Performance
items.content: Integrated tools for app delivery and background updates.

policies.title: On-Device AI Chat
policies.description: The portfolio advisor chat runs entirely on your device with no data collection.

items.label: Processing
items.content: Chat conversations are processed locally on your device using on-device AI. No messages are sent to external servers.

items.label: Data Retention
items.content: Conversations are not stored anywhere. They disappear when you close the app and are never backed up.

items.label: No Tracking
items.content: We do not collect, analyze, or retain your chat messages. Your conversations are completely private.

policies.title: Data Visibility & Control
policies.description: You have full control over your data and its visibility.

items.label: Visibility Toggle
items.content: By default, your portfolio is only discoverable if you opt-in via settings.

items.label: Account Deletion
items.content: Closing your account permanently deletes your profile and portfolio data from our active databases.

policies.title: Media Permissions
policies.description: The app requests specific permissions to function correctly.

items.label: Library Access
items.content: Used only to allow you to upload images of your work. We do not access other photos.
